title: eupatorium rugosum
intro: Eupatorium rugosum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Eupatorium rugosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Eupatorium rugosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
